# CGPDFDataFormat.jpegEncoded

**Case**

The data stream is encoded in JPEG format.

## Declaration

```swift
case jpegEncoded
```

## Constants

- **CGPDFDataFormat.raw**: The data stream is not encoded.
- **CGPDFDataFormat.JPEG2000**: The data stream is encoded in JPEG-2000 format.

items.description: The data stream is not encoded.
items.name: CGPDFDataFormat.raw

items.description: The data stream is encoded in JPEG-2000 format.
items.name: CGPDFDataFormat.JPEG2000

title: CGPDFDataFormat.jpegEncoded
